name: Palette Hi Hotel Bangkok
detail: The hotel environment was nice, clean, and comfortable.

name: Solaria Nishitetsu Hotel Bangkok
detail: Overall, the service standards here are truly outstanding.

name: Crystal Suites Suvarnabhumi Airport
detail: They have the best beds in asia. After traveling extensively this was by far the best most comfortable bed. Nice balcony if you smoke but they could put a chair or two out there to make it a bit more comfortable. Great hotel if you are just arriving or just leaving bangkok. Hotel shuttle bus is extra as is breakfast.

name: Somerset Ekamai Bangkok
detail: This hotel has everything you need and the best I ever experienced yet. The hotel has its own common room including a shared kitchen merely outside your room with kitchen essentials, such as: a coffee machine which allows you to help yourself free hot drinks with having to go out to the convenience shop, a microwave, fridge with free water bottles and a large dining table and a TV. The common room also has a balcony to enjoy the view. From staying at this hotel has allowed me experience what a enjoyable customer I got to be. Not only the staffs were always happy to help to carry my luggages to my room but they also went the extra mile in taken my intoxicated friend to her room and called the next morning to check up on her. If I visit Bangkok, I will definitely will be staying again and recommend anyone else who is reading to book at this hotel! I will not forget the staffs caring and professional service and the hotel itself!

name: Mandarin Hotel Managed by Centre Point
detail: Overall I would recommend staying at the Mandarin Hotel.

name: Asoke Residence Sukhumvit by UHG
detail: We chose this hotel on our way back to Chieng mai because of its location (near Airport extress train and MRT). We had a really wonderful time there! Check in took less than 3 min. They had all my details and my requests were perfectly met. The room was very clean and nicely decorated with 'real' wood floor and oversized windows. Bed very comfortable. Good water pressure with fantastic toiletries (natural lemongrass scent). With this quality, this is no doubt one of the best value hotels in Bangkok!

name: Grand Howard Hotel
detail: My son (15), my two daughters (12 and 9) and me stayed at the Grand Howard Hotel for nine nights. It was our first stay in Asia (even our first stay outside of Europe). The staff of the Grand Howard Hotel was very welcoming. The hotelroom was big, clean and had all comfort you need. We had a corner room in the 17th floor and could enjoy a spectacular view of Bangkok because of the very big windows. My children especially enjoyed the big swimming pool in the 6th floor. Part of it is roofed (protected from the sun) so you can use it at all day times. But the most we loved the staff of the hotel. They gave us good advice about what to see in Bangkok and they gave us a warm welcome every time when we returned to the hotel. We felt like being home. Thanks a lot to the staff of the Grand Howard Hotel!

name: Novotel Bangkok Sukhumvit 4
detail: My partner and I flew over to bangkok from England, we knew that the 6 hour difference was going to be hard to adjust to. So we decided to splash out for out first night and stay somewhere quiet and comfortable while we recover. I definitely recommend this hotel! It was quiet, clean, the staff were lovely, the breakfast was delightful- and to top it all off you can swim in the pool with one of the best views I've ever seen. Another thing to add, we happened to ge stuck in the elevator for 5 minutes - the staff were so quick at fixing it and were very apologetic - we didn't mind at all, as 5 minutes was hardly an inconvenience. Regardless, the staff personally wrote us an apology note and gave us a free fruit platter aswell!

name: Pullman Bangkok Hotel G
detail: I am a visitor from Hong Kong and stay at Pullman Hotel G. Yesterday was my first day to check in to the hotel, Unfortunately I found my luggage was wrongly pick up at the airport. I was feeling lost and don't know what to do at that moment cause me and my girl friend doesn't speak Thai-language, also I don't even have a contact of my airline. So I went back to the lobby and looking for HELP. One of your staff which stay at Bell Captain side call Ping heard my situation and started help me to found out the number of the airline and talk with them about my issue. After all the conversation done, Ping suggest me to take the wrong luggage back to airport first and let BFS to handle my case. While we sent back the luggage and go to travel around, it was mid-night when we back to hotel. Another Bell Captain JoJo was there and I was asked for help to tracking my case. It was 8 hours later since I sent back the luggage and seems no luck on it as JoJo mention after he help to call the BFS. JoJo said he will stay connect with the BFS and let me know any update if need. Finally, BFS call me one hour later and said mine luggage was back to the airport and will sent back to the hotel I live! The next day I go back to Bell Captain, NJ saw my letter which provide by the hotel and already know what am I think of. My luggage is back! It's really amazing on all of you guys which help me on this ultimate-scared case and I think the training and the empathy of your staff are very well. I will recommend all my friend who will be BangKoK to travel to come to Pullman Bangkok Hotel G ! Also, a concierge staff call OFF also help us to contact the Van we book cause the time on my booking time is complicated. Thanks for his help too. Finally, i was received a cheat call from bangkok, thanks for your staff GAM to help me translate and let them know we are not worth to cheat. Again, thank you so much for all of your staff which helps.

name: Carlton Hotel Bangkok Sukhumvit
detail: Although I live in Bangkok, The Carlton Hotel has become my preferred choice when I feel like a rejuvenating stay away from home. Stayed numerous times over the past few months. The friendly and professional team go above and beyond expectation. The guest rooms are well designed with gorgeous views of the Bangkok Skyline with the added benefit of the rooftop bar.
